name: |-Wario-| (Wario Land)
description:
“I’M A WARIO, I’M A GONNA WIN!”

Here we got the best character out of Mario, Luigi, and Waluigi, it’s WARIOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO.

He’s a man who will do literally anything for money, he’s as greedy as greedy gets. But in his body which very much could be made of gold, he could very likely have a heart of gold if you pay him gold or any money actually.

He’s also just unrealistically strong for some reason, but he’ll help you out if you really do need it.

Do note this consists of only Wario himself. No Mario, or Luigi, or Waluigi. But do we really need more when Wario is more then enough to satisfy the right person?

can you tell I really like Wario.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
